nasb.text: He who robs his father or his mother And says, “It is not a transgression,” Is the companion of a man who destroys.

esv.text: Whoever robs his father or his mother and says, “That is no transgression,” is a companion to a man who destroys.

cnv.text: 偷竊自己父母財物， 並說：“這不是罪過”的， 這人是與強盜一夥。

ccb.text: 窃取父母之财而不知罪者与匪类无异。

csbs.text: 抢夺自己父母却说“没犯罪”的， 这人是毁灭者的同伴。
